steps: "File Dutch dividend tax refund claim with Belastingdienst using IB 92 Universeel form for EUR 22,193.60 overpayment",
"Reference NL-NO tax treaty Article 10 limiting withholding to 15% (25% was applied instead of treaty rate)",
"Submit supporting documentation: custodian statement, treaty certificate, and Norwegian tax residency proof",
"Contact ABN AMRO Custody to verify if they can process treaty relief at source for future Unilever NV dividends"

references.title: Belastingdienst – Recipient of Dividend Outside Netherlands – Refund
